title: Our Story
subtitle: A union destined by families, blessed by God

met.title: First Meeting
met.description: Two families came together and introduced Rohit and Priti for the first time. What began as a formal meeting quickly felt like a familiar warmth — two hearts recognised each other instantly.

friendship.title: Roka Ceremony
friendship.description: Just ten days later, on 30th January 2026, both families celebrated the Roka — the joyful first step of officially sealing this beautiful union with blessings and sweets.

love.title: Getting to Know Each Other
love.description: In the months that followed, Rohit and Priti shared conversations, laughter, dreams and the quiet understanding that they were meant to walk this path together.

proposal.title: Lagun — The Sacred Promise
proposal.description: On 24th November 2026 in Gwalior, the Lagun ceremony marked the divine confirmation of this union — sacred rituals, family blessings, and a promise written for eternity.

wedding.title: The Wedding
wedding.description: On 25th November 2026, Rohit arrives as a groom in Kokapur, and together they take the seven sacred pheras — beginning their forever with God, family, and love as their witness.
